mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transit_cache (from_attraction_id, to_attraction_id, departure_hour, transport_type, duration_minutes, transport_mode) VALUES (#{fromAttractionId}, #{toAttractionId}, #{departureHour}, #{transportType}, #{durationMinutes}, #{transportMode}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE duration_minutes = VALUES(duration_minutes), transport_mode = VALUES(transport_mode), cached_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
